title: Randomized Textures
description: This pack randomizes all item and block textures within the game for a fun experience while creating YouTube videos or just messing with your friends
body:
This pack randomizes item and block textures for no reason whatsoever. You can create YouTube videos with this or just troll your friends either one works fine. I hope you have fun with this texture pack because this took a while to make
I originally made this for a friend for a random YouTube video which I will link here but then I found a better purpose for it as to release it for the people to download
